_comment: Written by scripts/regen-src-golden.mjs (#91). `sha256` must match tests/fixtures/src-bundle.golden.js — tests/src-bundle-parity.test.ts enforces it, so a hand-edited golden, or one regenerated by any means that skips the reason prompt, fails the gate.
reason: #121: the four carried-over tooltip-audit findings, all render-gate/label only. (1) Rhs1/Rhs2 (and the Rdhs1/Rdhs2 Daily twins) now render only when their zone setting is > 0 — the same predicate heirlooms.ts already enforces at runtime, so the user who fills both shield pickers, leaves the zone at its -1 default and silently gets no swap is now unreachable. (3) keepcores gets the turnOn/turnOff entry its Shield/Staff siblings had. (4) fastallocate now renders under U2 as well as U1, because perks.ts:1050 reads that same key to pick U2 radon allocation — one key, one control, no new id. (2) keepshields/keepstaffs/keepcores relabelled "Show * Mods" to match what they actually do. L0 baseline-zero is green: no AT decision changes.
